assertionResults.fullName: isDaytime TC-U-20: returns true when current time is between sunrise and sunset
assertionResults.title: TC-U-20: returns true when current time is between sunrise and sunset

assertionResults.fullName: isDaytime TC-U-21: returns false when current time is before sunrise
assertionResults.title: TC-U-21: returns false when current time is before sunrise

assertionResults.fullName: isDaytime TC-U-22: returns false when current time equals sunset (exclusive upper bound)
assertionResults.title: TC-U-22: returns false when current time equals sunset (exclusive upper bound)

assertionResults.fullName: isDaytime returns true when current time equals sunrise (inclusive lower bound)
assertionResults.title: returns true when current time equals sunrise (inclusive lower bound)

assertionResults.fullName: isDaytime returns false when current time is after sunset
assertionResults.title: returns false when current time is after sunset
